83		WebIDE WebIDEType `json:"webIDE" example:"jupyter | vscode"`

85		Annotations map[string]string `json:"annotations"`
86		// 容器镜像标签
87		Labels map[string]string `json:"labels"`
88		// 存储

90		// 状态
91		Status string `json:"status"`
92	}
93	
94	// CreateNamespaceResponse 创建命名空间响应

13	)

15	type Handler struct {
16		service devmachineservice.Service
17		logger  *zap.Logger
18	}
19	
20	func NewHandler(service devmachineservice.Service, logger *zap.Logger) *Handler {
21		return &Handler{
22			service: service,
23			logger:  logger,
24		}
25	}
26	
27	// CreatePod 创建 Pod
28	// @Summary      创建 Pod
29	// @Description  在 Kubernetes 中创建 Pod
30	// @Tags         开发机管理
31	// @Accept       json
32	// @Produce      json
33	// @Security     BearerAuth
34	// @Param        request body devmachinemodel.CreatePodRequest true "创建 Pod 请求"
35	// @Success      200  {object}  devmachinemodel.CreatePodResponse
36	// @Failure      400  {object}  map[string]string
37	// @Failure      500  {object}  map[string]string
38	// @Router       /devmachine/pod [post]
39	func (h *Handler) CreatePod(c *gin.Context) {
40		var req devmachinemodel.CreatePodRequest
41		if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&req); err != nil {
42			commonmodel.RespondBadRequest(c, err.Error())
43			return
44		}
45	
46		podSpec := &k8s.PodSpec{
47			Name:    req.Name,
48			Image:   req.Image,
49			Command: req.Command,
50			Args:    req.Args,
51			Env:     req.Env,
52			Labels:  req.Labels,
53		}
54	
55		if req.Resources != nil {
56			podSpec.Resources = &k8s.ResourceRequirements{
57				CPURequest:    req.Resources.CPURequest,
58				CPULimit:      req.Resources.CPULimit,
59				MemoryRequest: req.Resources.MemoryRequest,
60				MemoryLimit:   req.Resources.MemoryLimit,
61			}
62		}
63	
64		if err := h.service.CreatePod(c.Request.Context(), podSpec); err != nil {
65			h.logger.Error("failed to create pod", zap.Error(err), zap.String("name", req.Name))
66			commonmodel.RespondInternalError(c, err.Error())
67			return
68		}
69	
70		commonmodel.RespondSuccess(c, devmachinemodel.CreatePodResponse{Message: "pod created successfully"})
71	}
72	
73	// DeletePod 删除 Pod
74	// @Summary      删除 Pod
75	// @Description  从 Kubernetes 中删除 Pod
76	// @Tags         开发机管理

87		if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&req); err != nil {
88			commonmodel.RespondBadRequest(c, err.Error())
89			return
90		}
91	
92		if err := h.service.DeletePod(c.Request.Context(), req.Name); err != nil {
93			h.logger.Error("failed to delete pod", zap.Error(err), zap.String("name", req.Name))
94			commonmodel.RespondInternalError(c, err.Error())
95			return
96		}
97	
98		commonmodel.RespondSuccessWithMessage(c, "pod deleted successfully", nil)
99	}

281	func (h *Handler) ListDevmachines(c *gin.Context) {
282		// 从查询参数获取开发机列表
283		devmachinesJSON := c.Query("devmachines")
284		if devmachinesJSON == "" {
285			commonmodel.RespondBadRequest(c, "devmachines parameter is required")
286			return
287		}
288	
289		// 解析JSON字符串为开发机列表
290		var devmachines []devmachinemodel.DevmachineName
291		if err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(devmachinesJSON), &devmachines); err != nil {
292			h.logger.Error("failed to parse devmachines parameter", zap.Error(err), zap.String("input", devmachinesJSON))
293			commonmodel.RespondBadRequest(c, "invalid devmachines parameter format")
294			return
295		}
296	
297		h.logger.Info("listing devmachines by names",
298			zap.Int("count", len(devmachines)))
299	
300		// 调用service层的并行处理逻辑
301		devmachineList, err := h.service.ListDevmachines(c.Request.Context(), devmachines)
302		if err != nil {
303			h.logger.Error("failed to list devmachines", zap.Error(err))
304			commonmodel.RespondInternalError(c, err.Error())
305			return
306		}
307	
308		commonmodel.RespondSuccess(c, devmachinemodel.ListDevmachinesResponse{
309			Devmachines: devmachineList,
310		})
311	}

405		name := c.Param("name")
406	
407		status, err := h.service.GetDevmachineStatus(c.Request.Context(), namespace, name)
408		if err != nil {
409			h.logger.Error("failed to get devmachine status", zap.Error(err), zap.String("namespace", namespace), zap.String("name", name))
410			commonmodel.RespondInternalError(c, err.Error())
411			return
412		}
413	
414		commonmodel.RespondSuccess(c, status)
415	}
416	
417	// CreateNamespace 创建命名空间
418	// @Summary      创建命名空间
419	// @Description  在 Kubernetes 中创建新的命名空间
420	// @Tags         开发机管理
421	// @Accept       json
422	// @Produce      json
423	// @Security     BearerAuth
424	// @Param        request body devmachinemodel.CreateNamespaceRequest true "创建命名空间请求"
425	// @Success      200  {object}  devmachinemodel.CreateNamespaceResponse
426	// @Failure      400  {object}  map[string]string
427	// @Failure      500  {object}  map[string]string
428	// @Router       /devmachine/namespace [post]
429	func (h *Handler) CreateNamespace(c *gin.Context) {
430		var req devmachinemodel.CreateNamespaceRequest
431		if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&req); err != nil {
432			commonmodel.RespondBadRequest(c, err.Error())
433			return
434		}
435	
436		result, err := h.service.CreateNamespace(c.Request.Context(), &req)
437		if err != nil {
438			h.logger.Error("failed to create namespace", zap.Error(err), zap.String("namespace", req.Namespace))
439			commonmodel.RespondInternalError(c, err.Error())
440			return
441		}
442	
443		commonmodel.RespondSuccess(c, result)
444	}

1	package handler
2	
3	import (
4		"context"
5	
6		"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
7		swaggerFiles "github.com/swaggo/files"
8		ginSwagger "github.com/swaggo/gin-swagger"
9		"go.uber.org/zap"
10	
11		_ "code.srdcloud.cn/TDP-PaaS/tap/tap-edu-backend/docs/swagger" // swagger docs
12		"code.srdcloud.cn/TDP-PaaS/tap/tap-edu-backend/internal/config"
13		authhandler "code.srdcloud.cn/TDP-PaaS/tap/tap-edu-backend/internal/handler/auth"
14		devmachinehandler "code.srdcloud.cn/TDP-PaaS/tap/tap-edu-backend/internal/handler/devmachine"
15		enumhandler "code.srdcloud.cn/TDP-PaaS/tap/tap-edu-backend/internal/handler/enum"
16		imagehandler "code.srdcloud.cn/TDP-PaaS/tap/tap-edu-backend/internal/handler/image"
17		resourcehandler "code.srdcloud.cn/TDP-PaaS/tap/tap-edu-backend/internal/handler/resource"
18		statushandler "code.srdcloud.cn/TDP-PaaS/tap/tap-edu-backend/internal/handler/status"
19		storagehandler "code.srdcloud.cn/TDP-PaaS/tap/tap-edu-backend/internal/handler/storage"
20		volcanohandler "code.srdcloud.cn/TDP-PaaS/tap/tap-edu-backend/internal/handler/volcano"
21		"code.srdcloud.cn/TDP-PaaS/tap/tap-edu-backend/internal/middleware"
22		devmachineservice "code.srdcloud.cn/TDP-PaaS/tap/tap-edu-backend/internal/service/devmachine"
23		imageservice "code.srdcloud.cn/TDP-PaaS/tap/tap-edu-backend/internal/service/image"
24		statusmanager "code.srdcloud.cn/TDP-PaaS/tap/tap-edu-backend/internal/service/status"
25		storageservice "code.srdcloud.cn/TDP-PaaS/tap/tap-edu-backend/internal/service/storage"
26		volcanoservice "code.srdcloud.cn/TDP-PaaS/tap/tap-edu-backend/internal/service/volcano"
27		"code.srdcloud.cn/TDP-PaaS/tap/tap-edu-backend/pkg/auth"
28		"code.srdcloud.cn/TDP-PaaS/tap/tap-edu-backend/pkg/external/harbor"
29		"code.srdcloud.cn/TDP-PaaS/tap/tap-edu-backend/pkg/external/k8s"
30		"code.srdcloud.cn/TDP-PaaS/tap/tap-edu-backend/pkg/external/s3"
31		"code.srdcloud.cn/TDP-PaaS/tap/tap-edu-backend/pkg/external/tdsc"
32	)
33	
34	// RegisterRoutes 注册所有路由
35	func RegisterRoutes(r *gin.Engine, authMiddleware middleware.AuthMiddleware, authService auth.Service, logger *zap.Logger, cfg *config.Config) {
36	
37		// 初始化外部服务客户端（允许失败，不影响程序启动）
38		var s3Client s3.Client
39		var k8sClient k8s.Client
40		var tdscClient tdsc.Client
41	
42		// 初始化 S3 客户端
43		s3Client, err := s3.NewClient(cfg.S3)
44		if err != nil {
45			logger.Warn("failed to create s3 client, storage features will be disabled", zap.Error(err))
46		} else {
47			logger.Info("s3 client initialized successfully")
48		}
49	
50		// 初始化 Harbor 客户端
51		harborClient, err := harbor.NewClient(cfg.Harbor, nil)
52		if err != nil {
53			logger.Warn("failed to create harbor client, image features will be disabled", zap.Error(err))
54		} else {
55			logger.Info("harbor client initialized successfully")
56		}
57	
58		// 初始化 K8s 客户端
59		k8sClient, err = k8s.NewClient(cfg)
60		if err != nil {
61			logger.Warn("failed to create k8s client, devmachine features will be disabled", zap.Error(err))
62		} else {
63			logger.Info("k8s client initialized successfully")
64		}
65	
66		// 初始化 TDSC 客户端
67		if cfg.TDSC.URL != "" {
68			tdscClient, err = tdsc.NewClient(cfg.TDSC)
69			if err != nil {
70				logger.Warn("failed to create tdsc client, quota features will be disabled", zap.Error(err))
71			} else {
72				logger.Info("tdsc client initialized successfully")
73			}
74		}
75	
76		// 创建服务状态管理器
77		statusManager := statusmanager.NewManager(s3Client, harborClient, k8sClient, tdscClient, logger)
78	
79		// 启动后台健康检查（在后台 goroutine 中运行）
80		go func() {
81			ctx := context.Background()
82			statusManager.Start(ctx)
83		}()
84	
85		// 初始化业务服务
86		storageService := storageservice.NewService(s3Client, tdscClient)
87		imageService := imageservice.NewService(harborClient, cfg.Harbor, logger)
88		devmachineService := devmachineservice.NewService(k8sClient, cfg)
89		volcanoService := volcanoservice.NewService(k8sClient)
90	
91		// 初始化处理器
92		authHandler := authhandler.NewHandler(authService, logger)
93		storageHandler := storagehandler.NewHandler(storageService, authService, logger)
94		imageHandler := imagehandler.NewHandler(imageService, logger)
95		devmachineHandler := devmachinehandler.NewHandler(devmachineService, logger)
96		volcanoHandler := volcanohandler.NewHandler(volcanoService, logger)
97		statusHandler := statushandler.NewHandler(statusManager, logger)
98		resourceHandler := resourcehandler.NewHandler(cfg, logger)
99		enumHandler := enumhandler.NewHandler(logger)
100		enumHandler.InitEnumRegistry()
101	
102		// Swagger 文档
103		r.GET("/swagger/*any", ginSwagger.WrapHandler(swaggerFiles.Handler))
104	
105		// 健康检查
106		r.GET("/health", func(c *gin.Context) {
107			c.JSON(200, gin.H{"status": "ok"})
108		})
109	
110		// 服务状态查询路由（不需要认证，方便监控）
111		statusGroup := r.Group("/api/v1/status")
112		{
113			statusGroup.GET("", statusHandler.GetAllServiceStatus)
114			statusGroup.GET("/:name", statusHandler.GetServiceStatus)
115			statusGroup.POST("/:name/check", statusHandler.CheckServiceHealth)
116		}
117	
118		// 资源管理路由（不需要认证，提供枚举信息）
119		resourceGroup := r.Group("/api/v1/resources")
120		{
121			resourceGroup.GET("/gpuTypes", resourceHandler.ListGPUTypes)
122		}
123	
124		// 认证相关路由（不需要认证）
125		authGroup := r.Group("/api/v1/auth")
126		{
127			authGroup.POST("/login", authHandler.Login)
128		}
129	
130		// 存储管理路由（独立路由组，支持临时token认证）
131		storageGroup := r.Group("/api/v1/storage")
132		{
133			// 配额相关接口（需要 JWT/BasicAuth 认证，因为这些是管理操作）
134			quotaGroup := storageGroup.Group("")
135			quotaGroup.Use(authMiddleware.RequireAuth())
136			quotaGroup.GET("/bucket/quota", storageHandler.GetBucketQuota)
137			quotaGroup.GET("/folder/quota", storageHandler.GetFolderQuota)
138			quotaGroup.POST("/folder/quota", storageHandler.SetFolderQuota)
139	
140			// 文件操作接口（支持 JWT、BasicAuth 和临时 token 认证）
141			storageGroup.POST("/upload", authMiddleware.RequireFileAuth(auth.FileOpUpload), storageHandler.Upload)
142			storageGroup.GET("/download", authMiddleware.RequireFileAuth(auth.FileOpDownload), storageHandler.Download)
143			storageGroup.DELETE("/delete", authMiddleware.RequireFileAuth(auth.FileOpDelete), storageHandler.Delete)
144			storageGroup.GET("/list", authMiddleware.RequireFileAuth(auth.FileOpList), storageHandler.List)
145			// 创建文件夹
146			storageGroup.POST("/folder", authMiddleware.RequireFileAuth(auth.FileOpUpload), storageHandler.CreateFolder)
147			// 分片上传相关接口
148			storageGroup.POST("/multipart/init", authMiddleware.RequireFileAuth(auth.FileOpUpload), storageHandler.InitMultipartUpload)
149			storageGroup.POST("/multipart/upload", authMiddleware.RequireFileAuth(auth.FileOpUpload), storageHandler.UploadPart)
150			storageGroup.POST("/multipart/complete", authMiddleware.RequireFileAuth(auth.FileOpUpload), storageHandler.CompleteMultipartUpload)

1	package devmachine
2	
3	import "code.srdcloud.cn/TDP-PaaS/tap/tap-edu-backend/pkg/util"
4	
5	// Constants for dev machine status
6	const (
7		StatusCreating         = "creating"         // 创建中
8		StatusPending          = "pending"          // 排队中
9		StatusTerminating      = "terminating"      // 关机中
10		StatusCrashLoopBackOff = "crashloopbackoff" // 开机失败
11		StatusRunning          = "running"          // 运行中
12		StatusStopped          = "stopped"          // 已关机
13		StatusError            = "error"            // 错误状态
14		StatusUnknown          = "unknown"          // 未知状态
15	)
16	
17	type StatusEnumProvider struct{}
18	
19	var EnumItemMap = map[string]string{
20		StatusCreating:         "创建中",
21		StatusPending:          "排队中",
22		StatusTerminating:      "关机中",
23		StatusCrashLoopBackOff: "开机失败",
24		StatusRunning:          "运行中",
25		StatusStopped:          "已关机",
26		StatusError:            "错误状态",
27		StatusUnknown:          "未知状态",
28	}
29	
30	func (p *StatusEnumProvider) GetEnum() []util.EnumItem {
31		// 定义固定的顺序
32		orderedKeys := []string{
33			StatusCreating,
34			StatusPending,
35			StatusTerminating,
36			StatusCrashLoopBackOff,
37			StatusRunning,
38			StatusStopped,
39			StatusError,
40			StatusUnknown,
41		}
42		enumItems := make([]util.EnumItem, 0, len(orderedKeys))
43		for _, key := range orderedKeys {
44			if value, exists := EnumItemMap[key]; exists {
45				enumItems = append(enumItems, util.EnumItem{
46					Key:   key,
47					Value: value,
48				})
49			}
50		}
51		return enumItems
52	}
